sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80389" key="pekth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεκ-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n80389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shearer</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> ; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ποκτήρ</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
